member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.AsyncEventHandler
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous event handler that returns a .

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.AsyncEventHandlerExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for .

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.AsyncEventHandlerExtensions.InvokeAsync(BlazingStory.Abstractions.AsyncEventHandler)
member.summary: Invokes all delegates in the invocation list sequentially and awaits each one.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter
member.summary: Represents a component parameter with its metadata and value.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.Type
member.summary: Gets the CLR type of the parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.TypeStructure
member.summary: Gets the type structure describing nullability and generic information of the parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.Summary
member.summary: Gets the summary description of the parameter extracted from XML documentation.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.Required
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the parameter is required.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.Control
member.summary: Gets or sets the UI control type used to edit this parameter.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.DefaultValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the default value of the parameter.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.UpdateSummaryFromXmlDocCommentAsync
member.summary: Update summary property text of this parameter by reading a XML document comment file.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IComponentParameter.GetParameterTypeStrings
member.summary: Gets the string representations of the parameter type.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory
member.summary: Represents a single story definition for a UI component.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.Title
member.summary: Gets the display title of this story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of this story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.ComponentType
member.summary: The type of the target UI component in this story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.StoriesRazorDescriptor
member.summary: Gets the descriptor of the Stories Razor component that defines this story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.Context
member.summary: Gets the story context containing arguments and parameters for this story.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStory.NavigationPath
member.summary:
Gets a navigation path string for this story.
(ex. "examples-ui-button--primary")

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext
member.summary: Provides access to a story's arguments, parameters, and state management.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.Args
member.summary: Gets the current argument values keyed by parameter name.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.Parameters
member.summary: Gets the component parameters associated with this story.

member.name: E:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.ArgumentChanged
member.summary: Occurs when an argument value is changed.

member.name: E:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.ArgumentsReset
member.summary: Occurs when argument values are all reset to their default values.

member.name: E:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.ShouldRender
member.summary: This event is used to notify the story that it should re-render.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.GetNoEventParameterCount
member.summary: Get the number of parameters that are not event parameters.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.InitArgument(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes an argument with the specified name and value.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.ResetArgumentsAsync
member.summary: Resets all arguments to their default values.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.AddOrUpdateArgumentAsync(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new argument or updates an existing one with the specified value.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.IStoryContext.InvokeShouldRender
member.summary: This method is used to notify the story that it should re-render.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.StoriesRazorDescriptor
member.summary: Holds the type and attribute information for a Stories Razor component.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.StoriesRazorDescriptor.TypeOfStoriesRazor
member.summary: The type of the Stories Razor component.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.StoriesRazorDescriptor.StoriesAttribute
member.summary: The applied to the Stories Razor component.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.StoriesRazorDescriptor.#ctor(System.Type,BlazingStory.Types.StoriesAttribute)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The type of the Stories Razor component.
The attribute applied to the Stories Razor component.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure
member.summary: Describes the structure of a type, including nullability, generics, and constituent types.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.IsNullable
member.summary: Indicates whether the type is nullable.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.IsGeneric
member.summary: Indicates whether the type is a generic type.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.PrimaryType
member.summary: The primary (outermost) type.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.SecondaryTypes
member.summary: The generic type arguments, if any.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Abstractions.TypeStructure.Deconstruct(System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@,System.Type@,System.Type[]@)
member.summary: Deconstructs this instance into its constituent parts.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Types.ControlType
member.summary: Specifies the type of UI control used to edit a story parameter in the Controls panel.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Types.ControlType.Default
member.summary: Uses the default control automatically determined by the parameter type.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Types.ControlType.Radio
member.summary: Uses radio buttons for selection.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Types.ControlType.Select
member.summary: Uses a dropdown select box for selection.

member.name: F:BlazingStory.Types.ControlType.Color
member.summary: Uses a color picker control.

member.name: T:BlazingStory.Types.StoriesAttribute
member.summary: Marks a component class as a stories definition and assigns it a title for navigation.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Types.StoriesAttribute.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title used to group and display the stories in the navigation tree.

member.name: P:BlazingStory.Types.StoriesAttribute.FilePath
member.summary: Gets the source file path of the caller that applied this attribute.

member.name: M:BlazingStory.Types.StoriesAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The title used to group and display the stories.
The file path of the caller, automatically provided by the compiler.
